description: Single-slide baseline deck with explicit text runs and stable formatting.
risk: Baseline load, cleanup, export, and fidelity path.

description: Canonical six-slide master acceptance deck with one clean reference slide, one typography drift slide, one alignment drift slide, one bullet/indent drift slide, one spacing drift slide, and one compact QA matrix slide.
risk: Single truth-source deck for product-level before/after review across the six core cleanup classes.

description: Single body shape with explicit font family and font size drift.
risk: Mixed explicit font family and font size runs in one body shape.

description: One paragraph containing mixed font runs inside the same paragraph node.
risk: Mixed font runs inside the same paragraph.

description: Single-slide boundary deck with explicit paragraph-level font-family and font-size roles that should remain visible after cleanup.
risk: Prevents global font flattening from mutating legitimate typography hierarchy.

description: Nine-slide combined QA deck that merges clean reference, typography, alignment, bullet, spacing, hostile mixed, and boundary-role sections into one deterministic manual review file.
risk: Single-deck manual QA surface for cross-category cleanup evidence and over-normalization checks without forcing the asset into the main recovery gate.

description: Bullet-heavy deck with multiple levels and mixed run formatting.
risk: Multiple bullet levels with explicit indentation and mixed run formatting.

description: Two-slide deck with nested bullet lists and repeated indentation patterns.
risk: Nested bullet indentation and repeated list structures.

description: Single-slide bullet list with one explicit bullet-symbol outlier inside an otherwise uniform list.
risk: Bullet symbol normalization evidence on an admitted eligible corpus input.

description: Single-slide bullet list with one isolated deep indentation jump bracketed by same-level siblings.
risk: Bullet indent normalization evidence for a detected jump that should reduce safely on an admitted eligible corpus input.

description: Placeholder-style title and body shapes across multiple slides.
risk: Placeholder-heavy template structures.

description: Dense placeholder-style template with repeated title/body placeholders.
risk: Placeholder-heavy templates with repeated content shapes.

description: Slides containing field nodes alongside text runs.
risk: Field nodes alongside text runs that must preserve token order and content.

description: Deck with theme and slide-master entries but partially inherited text formatting.
risk: Theme inheritance and sparse explicit run formatting.

description: Single-slide deck with one eligible body group whose explicit alignment differs from the dominant body style.
risk: Alignment reduction through dominant-body-style cleanup on admitted corpus input.

description: Single-slide boundary deck with centered and right-aligned body callouts that should remain distinct because typography marks separate alignment roles.
risk: Prevents alignment cleanup from flattening legitimate centered and right-aligned body roles into the dominant left baseline.

description: Seven-slide hostile stress deck covering mixed hostile typography, alignment variance, bullet marker and indent variance, line-spacing extremes, paragraph-spacing extremes, one mixed chaos slide, and one QA matrix slide.
risk: Repeatable hostile proof loop for mixed-category cleanup with text-heavy deterministic stress inputs.

description: Five-slide mixed hard boundary deck combining centered hero, right-aligned KPI and attribution roles, a distinct Georgia callout, a mixed intentional role composition, and a QA matrix slide with list and spacing boundaries.
risk: Prevents hostile recovery work from flattening intentional alignment and typography roles while still surfacing list and spacing boundaries.

description: Single-slide template anchor deck with stable left-aligned body groups and uniform explicit Calibri body text.
risk: Phase 4 recovery anchor for moderate-confidence fingerprint comparison without non-font drift.

description: Single-slide companion deck with one explicit Arial body run inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Calibri body style.
risk: Phase 4 recovery proof surface for a narrow fingerprint-driven font-family experiment.

description: Two-slide template anchor deck with stable left-aligned body groups and uniform explicit Calibri body text across both slides.
risk: Phase 4 recovery anchor for repeated font-family proof across multiple slides.

description: Two-slide companion deck with repeated explicit Arial outlier runs across multiple slides inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Calibri body style.
risk: Phase 4 recovery breadth proof surface for repeated fingerprint-driven font-family experimentation.

description: Single-slide external template anchor deck with stable left-aligned Aptos body groups and uniform explicit 20pt body text.
risk: Phase 4 external-template anchor family for non-self-confirming template matching and known-style normalization proof.

description: Single-slide companion deck with one centered body target inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Aptos body style.
risk: Phase 4 external-template alignment proof surface without same-deck self-confirmation.

description: Single-slide companion deck with one explicit Arial outlier run inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Aptos body style.

description: Single-slide conflicting external anchor with identical Aptos typography but right-aligned body groups.
risk: Phase 4 external-template blocked and ambiguous selection proof surface with conflicting corroboration.

description: Two-slide external template anchor deck with repeated left-aligned Aptos body groups and uniform explicit 20pt body text across both slides.
risk: Phase 5 enforcement safety anchor for repeated admitted external-template alignment and font-family validation on multislide decks.

description: Two-slide companion deck with centered target body paragraphs on each slide inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Aptos body style.
risk: Phase 5 enforcement safety proof for repeated admitted external-template alignment enforcement without collateral typography drift.

description: Two-slide companion deck with repeated explicit Arial outlier paragraphs and one retained 22pt size outlier inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Aptos body style.

description: Two-slide conflicting external anchor with identical Aptos typography but right-aligned body groups across both slides.
risk: Phase 5 enforcement safety ambiguous/blocking proof for multislide external-template enforcement.

description: Two-slide external template anchor deck with left-aligned Aptos body groups plus inherited and mixed-run standalone noise across both slides.
risk: Phase 5 recovery anchor for highly inconsistent template-driven enforcement validation without widening scope.

description: Two-slide highly inconsistent companion deck with centered target body paragraphs on each slide inside an otherwise admitted left-aligned Aptos template family.
risk: Phase 5 recovery proof for admitted alignment enforcement on highly inconsistent template-driven decks.

description: Two-slide highly inconsistent companion deck with repeated explicit Arial outlier runs inside a noisy admitted Aptos template family while out-of-scope font-size noise remains present.

description: Two-slide conflicting highly inconsistent external anchor with identical Aptos typography but right-aligned body groups.

description: Synthetic AI-generated-like quarterly update deck that still matches the Aptos template family and presents only an in-envelope alignment drift.

description: Synthetic AI-generated-like quarterly strategy deck that still matches the Aptos template family and presents only an in-envelope font-family drift.

description: Synthetic AI-generated-like story draft deck that still matches the Aptos family but is intended to represent a narrative-rewrite expectation outside the proven envelope.

description: Synthetic AI-generated-like multislide product-plan deck that belongs to the Calibri family rather than the Aptos admitted template family.

description: Synthetic AI-generated-like multislide deck with admitted Aptos-family matching but highly inconsistent local overrides and retained out-of-scope font-size noise.

description: Synthetic AI-generated-like multislide deck that still points at the admitted Aptos family but is intended to represent unsupported structure-repair needs on top of alignment drift.
risk: Generated guard case that should stay blocked because the real recovery need exceeds the proven narrow alignment and font-family envelope.
